#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#
#           chunk1: estimate heritability and genetic correlaiton
#
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#get h2 for multiple traits
phenotypes=("amed2" "ahei2" "dash2" "pdi2" "hpdi2" "updi2" "edip2" "edih2")
cohorts=("NHS" "WHI" "SOL")

for cohort in "${cohorts[@]}"; do
	for phenotype in "${phenotypes[@]}"; do
	./ldsc.py --h2 "$cohort"/munged/"$phenotype".sumstats.gz \
    --ref-ld-chr eur_w_ld_chr/ \
    --w-ld-chr eur_w_ld_chr/ \
    --out "$cohort"/h2/"$phenotype"
	done
done

#munge outcome and exposure (METAL) summary data
phenotypes=("T2D" "Pro" "ISI" "IFC" "amed2" "ahei2" "dash2" "pdi2" "hpdi2" "updi2" "edip2" "edih2")

for phenotype in "${phenotypes[@]}"; do
	./munge_sumstats.py \
    --out munged/"$phenotype" \
    --merge-alleles w_hm3.snplist \
    --chunksize 500000 \
    --a1 ALT \
    --a2 REF \
    --snp SNP \
    --sumstats MR/"$phenotype"_1KGP.hg19.txt
done 

#get rg for multiple traits
phenotypes=("T2D" "Pro" "ISI" "IFC")

for phenotype in "${phenotypes[@]}"; do
	./ldsc.py \
	--rg "$phenotype".sumstats.gz,amed2.sumstats.gz,ahei2.sumstats.gz,dash2.sumstats.gz,pdi2.sumstats.gz,hpdi2.sumstats.gz,updi2.sumstats.gz,edip2.sumstats.gz,edih2.sumstats.gz \
	--ref-ld-chr ldsc_tools/eur_w_ld_chr/ \
	--w-ld-chr eur_w_ld_chr/ \
	--out rg/"$phenotype"
done

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#
#           chunk2: TWAS analysis
#
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
for tissue in ./WEIGHTS/*.pos; do
name=$(basename "$tissue" .pos)
for chr in {1..22}; do
Rscript FUSION.assoc_test.R \
--sumstats edip.sumstats \
--weights $tissue \
--weights_dir ./WEIGHTS/ \
--ref_ld_chr ./LDREF/1000G.EUR. \
--chr $chr \
--out ./results/EDIP/${name}.chr${chr}.dat &
  
  while [ $(jobs -r | wc -l) -ge $max_jobs ]; do
sleep 5
done
done
done
wait

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#
#           chunk3: colocalization
#
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
gwas.p.threshold = 5e-8
eqtl.p.threshold = 0.01
gene.boundary.window.size = 1000000
lead.snp.window.size = 500000
gwas.response.type = "quant"
coloc.p1 = 1e-04
coloc.p2 = 1e-04
coloc.p12 = 1e-05
run.cojo = F
cojo.maf = 0.001

all_res_coloc = NULL

for (i in 1:48) {
  
  tissue_file = tissue_list[i]
  gene_list = fread(paste0(tissue_file, ".epi"))
  eqtl_N = tissue_sumgtex$N[which(tissue_sumgtex$tissue == names[i])]
  
  for (row_i in 1:nrow(gene_list)) {
    
    # row_i = 1
    row = gene_list[row_i,]
    gene = row$V5
    
    
    tmpfile = tempfile(pattern = paste0("file_", row_i, "_"), tmpdir = tempdir(), fileext = "")
    cmd = paste0(smr_path, " --query ", eqtl.p.threshold, " --beqtl-summary ", tissue_file, " --gene ", gene, " --out ", tmpfile)
    print(cmd)
    system(cmd)
    eqtl = fread(paste0(tmpfile, ".txt"))
    unlink(paste0(tmpfile, ".txt"))
    
    common_snp = intersect(sumstat$SNP, eqtl$SNP)
    
    if (length(common_snp) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    eqtl_sub = eqtl %>%
      filter(SNP %in% common_snp)
    gwas_sub = sumstat %>%
      filter(SNP %in% common_snp)
    
    d1 = list(
      snp=gwas_sub$SNP, pvalues = gwas_sub$P,
      beta = gwas_sub$BETA, varbeta = gwas_sub$SE^2,
      N = round(median(gwas_sub$N, na.rm=T)),
      # MAF = pmin(gwas_sub$FREQ, 1-gwas_sub$FREQ),
      sdY = 1,
      type = "quant"
    )
    
    d2 = list(
      snp=eqtl_sub$SNP, pvalues = eqtl_sub$p,
      beta = eqtl_sub$b, varbeta = eqtl_sub$SE^2,
      N = eqtl_N,
      sdY = 1,
      type = "quant"
    )
    
    coloc_res = tryCatch.W.E(coloc.abf(
      dataset1=d1, 
      dataset2=d2, 
      p1=coloc.p1,p2=coloc.p2,p12=coloc.p12))
    
    warn = inherits(coloc_res$warning,"warning")
    error = inherits(coloc_res$value,"error")
    
    if (error) { 
      # message(paste0("Error: ", tissue_name_i, ": ", tissue)); 
      return(NULL)
    } else {
      
      coloc_res_tmp = data.frame(
        trait = trait,
        tissue = names[i],
        as.data.frame(t(coloc_res$value[[1]]))
      )
    }
    all_res_coloc = rbind(all_res_coloc, coloc_res_tmp)
  }
  fwrite(all_res_coloc, paste0("coloc_", trait, "_", ".txt"), row.names=F, quote=F, sep="\t")
}

writeLines("Finished all")

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#
#           chunk4: MR analysis
#
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
for (i in 1:8){
  
  load(paste("LD.pruning.for.",name[i],".RData",sep=''))
  
  exposure = name[i]
  
  exp = mr_use[[i]][,c("SNP","CHR","BP","A1","A2","Beta","SE","P")]
  names(exp)[6:8] = c("t1_Beta","t1_Se","t1_P")
  
  #outcome
  outcome = "T2D"
  
  t2d <- t2d_1KGP.a[,c("SNP","CHR","BP","A1","A2","Beta","SE","P")]
  names(t2d)[6:8] = c("t2_Beta","t2_Se","t2_P")
  t2d$t2_Beta=-1*t2d$t2_Beta
  
  #merge exposure and outcome
  if ( identical(exp[,2:5], t2d[,2:5]) ) {
    X = cbind(exp, t2d[,c("t2_Beta","t2_Se","t2_P")])
  } else{
    X = merge(exp, t2d, by=c("CHR","BP","A1","A2"))
  }
  dim(X)
  head(X)
  tail(X)
  
  names(X)[5] <- "SNP"; names(X)[9] <- "rsid"
  
  #build MR analyses results file and paramaters
  get = data.frame(exp=NA,out=NA,p.thr=NA,snpno=NA,
                   IVW_beta=NA,  IVW_se=NA,  IVW_p=NA,    # 6:8
                   MBE_beta=NA,  MBE_se=NA,  MBE_p=NA,    # 9:11
                   WMed_beta=NA, WMed_se=NA, WMed_p=NA,   # 12:14
                   Egger_beta=NA,Egger_se=NA,Egger_p=NA)  # 15:17
  
  for (j in 3:3) {
    # Get SNP list
    glist = as.vector(PRUNED.a[[j]])
    glist = glist[!is.na(glist)]
    # Make MRInput object
    Xj = X[which(X$SNP %in% glist),] %>% as.data.frame()
    Xj_Input = mr_input(bx   = Xj[,"t1_Beta"],
                        bxse = Xj[,"t1_Se"],
                        by   = Xj[,"t2_Beta"],
                        byse = Xj[,"t2_Se"],
                        snps = Xj[,"SNP"],
                        effect_allele = Xj[,"A1"],
                        other_allele  = Xj[,"A2"])
    # Run MR analysess
    MRfit_ivw   = mr_ivw(Xj_Input)
    MRfit_mbe   = mr_mbe(Xj_Input)
    MRfit_wmed  = mr_median(Xj_Input)
    MRfit_egger = mr_egger(Xj_Input)
    # Save results -- model info
    get[j,"exp"] = exposure
    get[j,"out"] = outcome
    get[j,"p.thr"] = c(1e-5,1e-6,5e-8)[j]
    get[j,"snpno"] = length(glist)
    # Save results -- IVW
    get[j,5:7] = c(MRfit_ivw$Estimate, MRfit_ivw$StdError, MRfit_ivw$Pvalue)
    # Save results -- MBE
    get[j,8:10] = c(MRfit_mbe$Estimate, MRfit_mbe$StdError, MRfit_mbe$Pvalue)
    # Save results -- Median
    get[j,11:13] = c(MRfit_wmed$Estimate, MRfit_wmed$StdError, MRfit_wmed$Pvalue)
    # Save results -- Egger
    get[j,14:16] = c(MRfit_egger$Estimate, MRfit_egger$StdError.Est, MRfit_egger$Pvalue.Est)
    write.csv(get, file=paste("MR_", name[i], "_T2D.csv", sep=''))
  }
  
  print(paste("Completed 1 -- ", i, "/ 8 for", exposure, "-->", outcome, sep=" "))
  
}
